nasb.text: And He buried him in the valley in the land of Moab, opposite Beth-peor; but no man knows his burial place to this day.

esv.text: and he buried him in the valley in the land of Moab opposite Beth-peor; but no one knows the place of his burial to this day.

cnv.text: 耶和華把他埋葬在摩押地，伯．毘珥對面的山谷裡，只是直到今日還沒有人知道埋葬他的地方。

ccb.text: 耶和华把他安葬在摩押境内伯·毗珥对面的山谷，至今无人知道摩西的坟墓在哪里。
